## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123. For significant changes, please link a prior issue/discussion. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `refactor` / `chore` — internal change

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines.
- [ ] My commits follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) style.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for my change.
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally and CI is green.
- [ ] For parser changes, I added a representative SQL case under `examples/` or `tests/`.
- [ ] Graph/ID output stays deterministic for the same input.

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should focus on, trade-offs, or follow-ups. -->
